hero.headline: Something’s been off lately? — even if you can’t quite explain it?
hero.subheadline:
You don’t need to wait until things fall apart to talk to someone.

We’re offering a limited number of sessions with $0 out-of-pocket cost after Medicare — so you can get support without the usual barriers.

No pressure. Just a chance to feel clearer, calmer, and more like yourself again.

eligibility_text: I have a valid Mental Health Care Plan from my GP
eligibility_helper: This allows Medicare rebates for psychology sessions

email_capture.heading: Where do we send your offer and instructions to?

offer.heading: You're eligible for our 100% rebated introductory offer
offer.value_text: Your first session is fully covered after rebate
offer.subtext:
How the $0 session works

You’ll pay for your session upfront — this is the standard Medicare process.

After your session, Medicare rebates you, and for this trial we cover the remaining gap — so your final out-of-pocket cost is $0.

This approach helps reduce no-shows and keeps sessions available for people who genuinely want support.

psychologist_selection.heading: Here is the experienced psychologist who is available now

booking_bridge.heading: Almost there - next you'll choose a time and book
booking_bridge.subheading: You'll be redirected to our secure booking platform
booking_bridge.step1: View available appointments for your chosen psychologist
booking_bridge.important_note:
Select '50-minute session', then available session times will appear. Please keep your discount code handy.

If it’s $0, why do I pay upfront?

Great question — it’s simply how Medicare works for psychology services.

The upfront payment secures your appointment and ensures your psychologist’s time is protected.

After your session, Medicare rebates you — and during this trial, we cover the gap so you’re not out of pocket.   

You’ll see the full session fee at booking — this is normal.
Medicare will rebate you after, and we cover the gap during this trial.
booking_bridge.footer_note: You'll be redirected to Halaxy, our secure booking platform
